name: CoJax Oil & Gas Corp
business: CoJax Oil & Gas Corp is an early-stage oil and gas company focused on the acquisition, exploitation, and development of crude oil and natural gas properties in the Gulf States Drill Region. The company sells crude oil and natural gas produced from its properties to purchasers on a month-to-month basis. It currently has limited production and relies on contractors for drilling and operations.

exposures.sentence: We are an early-stage development oil and gas company seeking to become an independent energy company.
